title: taraxacum gelricum
intro: Taraxacum gelricum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum gelricum include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum gelricum can be found in the form of teas, capsules, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
